ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the card */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the card (e.g., Gld, R, W) */,
  "mana" TEXT /* Mana cost of the card (e.g., WUU, 2R, 1GU) */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the card (e.g., R, C, M) */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the set the card belongs to */,
  "set_url" TEXT /* URL of the set the card belongs to */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the card */,
  "power" TEXT /* Power of the card */,
  "toughness" TEXT /* Toughness of the card */,
  "card_text" TEXT /* Card text */,
  "flavor_text" TEXT /* Flavor text */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the card image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the vendor */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the vendor */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the card from the vendor */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the price was last updated */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the card (e.g., Near Mint, Lightly Played) */,
  "foil" INTEGER /* Whether the card is foil */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the card */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the collection */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the collection was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the collection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_cards" (
  "collection_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection card entry */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the card in the collection */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the card (e.g., Near Mint, Lightly Played) */,
  "foil" INTEGER /* Whether the card is foil */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the card */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_cards_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_cards_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_alerts" (
  "price_alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor */,
  "threshold_price" REAL /* Threshold price set by the user */,
  "above_below" TEXT /* Whether the alert is for above or below the threshold price */,
  "notification_sent" INTEGER /* Whether a notification has been sent for this alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message sent to the user */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendor_ratings" (
  "vendor_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the vendor */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text written by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_ratings_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vendor_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the card image */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., PNG, JPEG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_images_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "set_list" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the set */,
  "set_url" TEXT /* URL of the set */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mana_costs" (
  "mana_cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mana cost */,
  "mana_cost" TEXT /* Mana cost (e.g., WUU, 2R, 1GU) */,
  "mana_value" INTEGER /* Mana value (e.g., 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mana_cost_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., PayPal, credit card) */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Credit card number */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the credit card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the card in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the card in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
